message:
test(oracle): add 9 conformance tests for subquery aggregation, UPDATE subquery, defaults, CROSS JOIN, GROUP_CONCAT, NULL functions, table copy, multiple CTEs, comparison edges

All 9 new oracle tests pass with zero mismatches.
Core: 1690 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
